sources.authority: Estonian Weather Service (Riiklik Ilmajaam) via MeteoAlarm
sources.notes: Official Estonian weather warnings (CAP/GeoJSON) distributed through the EUMETNET MeteoAlarm network. Covers wind, snow/ice, thunderstorm, heat, flood, coastal event and other hazard awareness levels.

FDSN event web service filtered to the Estonian land bbox (57.3-60.5 N, 21.0-28.2 E). Estonia has low seismicity but Baltic shield micro-tremors and regional events are recorded. No national seismological public API; USGS feed is the fallback authoritative source.

ENTSO-E RESTful API for the Estonian control area (Elering, domain 10Y1001A1001A39I). Requires a free registered security token (api-key). Provides load, generation, cross-border physical flows and day-ahead prices.

sources.authority: GDACS (Global Disaster Alert and Coordination System)
sources.notes: Multi-hazard (earthquake, flood, cyclone, volcano, drought) event list. Can filter by country=EE. Useful as a regional cross-check for earthquakes and large flood events affecting the Baltic region.
